# Selio Marketing Co - AI & LLM Context File (llms.txt)

Selio Marketing Co is a premier global digital agency specializing in luxury branding, high-conversion web development, haute couture e-commerce platforms, SEO, Answer Engine Optimization (AEO), and Generative Engine Optimization (GEO).

## Agency Information
- Website: https://www.seliomarketing.com
- Contact Email: selioagencyy@gmail.com
- Phone: +91 73062 60004
- Main Routes:
  - Homepage: https://www.seliomarketing.com/
  - About: https://www.seliomarketing.com/about
  - Services: https://www.seliomarketing.com/services
  - Portfolio / Works: https://www.seliomarketing.com/work
  - Insights / Blog: https://www.seliomarketing.com/blog
  - Contact: https://www.seliomarketing.com/contact

## Featured Portfolio & Case Study Reports

### 1. GreenNest Realty
- Case Study URL: https://www.seliomarketing.com/work/green-nest-realty
- Live Website Demo: https://green-nest-realty.vercel.app/
- Category: Sustainable Luxury Real Estate Web Platform
- Key Highlights: Carbon-neutral luxury villa portal, vetted sustainability badges, sub-second Next.js SSR performance, interactive property filter matrix.
- Empirical Results: +45% increase in high-intent lead inquiries, 2.8x higher session duration, 99/100 Lighthouse performance rating.

### 2. Fashnova
- Case Study URL: https://www.seliomarketing.com/work/fashnova
- Live Website Demo: https://fashnova-taupe.vercel.app/
- Category: Luxury Haute Couture E-Commerce Flagship Store
- Key Highlights: Quiet luxury dark-gold design system, editorial lookbook campaign banners, instant slide-over drawer cart & wishlist, order tracking interface.
- Empirical Results: +320% checkout conversion rate increase, 60% reduction in cart abandonment, 4.9/5 UX satisfaction rating.

## Services Offered
- Custom Web Application & Storefront Engineering (Next.js, React, Tailwind CSS, TypeScript)
- Luxury Brand Strategy & Cinematic Visual Design
- Search Engine Optimization (SEO) & Structured Schema Architecture
- Answer Engine Optimization (AEO) for AI search tools (Perplexity, ChatGPT, Claude)
- Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) & Semantic Context Graphs

## Technical Stack
Next.js App Router, React, Tailwind CSS, TypeScript, Framer Motion, GSAP, Lucide Icons, and Vercel.
